scripts.build: cd artifacts/api-server && node ./build.mjs && cd ../mockup-sandbox && npx vite build && cd ../.. && mkdir -p dist && cp -r artifacts/mockup-sandbox/dist/* dist/ && mkdir -p artifacts/api-server/dist/public && cp -r artifacts/mockup-sandbox/dist/* artifacts/api-server/dist/public/
scripts.typecheck: npm run typecheck:libs && npm run typecheck --workspaces --if-present
